lines.en:
Slide the lower screen
to make a hopeful face

Slide the lower screen
to make a cold face

Slide the lower screen
to look like you're
trying to remember

Slide the lower screen
to make a worried face

Touch the lower screen
where you think
the little lamb is

Touch the lower screen
to put a hand
to your chest

Touch the lower screen
to press foreheads
together

Slide the lower screen
to transform

Touch the lower screen
where you want to appeal

Slide the lower screen
to look while
handing it over

Slide the lower screen
in the direction to look

Touch the lower screen
to tap your chest
a few times

Touch the lower screen
to wave away the smoke
